action.reasoning: Observation: Embedded DKT (h=512/l=2/e=64/d=0.3) hit new best test AUC 0.7548 (val peak 0.7582 ~ep10), then clear overfitting (val drops while train loss keeps falling to 0.457). Analysis: Capacity still limited and regularization insufficient for later epochs; larger hidden + stronger dropout/wd + early stopping will improve generalization without OOM (params remain <<1B) or excessive time (~2s/epoch). Decision: Incrementally edit only train.py with h=1024/l=2/d=0.5/e=96/epochs=30/lr=5e-4/wd=1e-4/scheduler-patience=4 + ES-patience=12 on val AUC; run training then immediately submit_eval on best_model.pt for new score and time measurement.
